citation_tightness.note: All factual claims are cited with adjacent markers [1] or [2].

completeness.note: Missing regulatory status and key safety data, which are major evidence rows.

flow.note: Main content follows logical order, but methods section placement disrupts minor flow.

hedging_appropriateness.note: Prose appropriately acknowledges evidence without overconfidence or contradiction.

tone_consistency.note: Tone remains evidence-grounded and avoids promotional language.
